CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_SLA_Escalation_Monitor when TODAY >= nepa_sla_due_date__c - Warning_Days. Prevents duplicate warning notifications on subsequent daily runs. Reset to false when nepa_sla_due_date__c changes (new review type or start date correction).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Warning notification has been sent for this SLA deadline.
CustomField.label: SLA Warning Sent
